channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — May 19, 2026
item.description: He has not realized as yet how wholly impossible such a demand would be. He can learn this only as he actually does give up the valueless.Through this he learns that where he anticipated grief he finds a happy light-heartedness instead; where he thought something was asked of him he finds a gift bestowed on him. Now comes a “period of settling down.”This is a quiet time, in which the teacher of Go

item.title: Lesson 34: “I could see peace instead of this.”
item.description: “I could see peace instead of this.” The idea for today begins to describe the conditions that prevail in the other way of seeing. Peace of mind is clearly an internal matter. It must begin with your own thoughts, and then extend outward. It is from your peace of mind that a peaceful perception of the world arises. Three longer practice periods are required for today’s exercises. One in the
